LanguageData.PS_RoleDirectorDesc: Play from an omniscient point of view, only managing the characters. The classic experience.
LanguageData.PS_RoleCharacterDesc: Play from the point of view of your characters. Leader management playstyle.
LanguageData.PS_ModeAuthenticDesc: You must stick with the character you choose forever. You may never switch to omniscient view, and are always in your character's shoes.\n\nRecommended for narrative experiences.
LanguageData.PS_ModeSwapDesc: You may switch between characters, but must always remain in the perspective of the characters.\n\nRecommended for players who like the playstyle but want more control over multiple characters.
LanguageData.PS_ModeDynamicDesc: While your primary form of play will be within your characters, you may swap between director style play or playing as any of your characters at any point.\n\nRecommended for players who want the flexibility of all perspective playstyles.
LanguageData.PS_DisableAimingDelay: Disable aiming time for player character
LanguageData.PS_DisableAimingDelayDesc: When checked, your controlled character fires weapons instantly without having to wait for the weapon's aiming cycle. Cooldown between shots still applies.
LanguageData.PS_TotalFreedomDesc: Always allow character switching regardless of any settings.
LanguageData.PS_AllowNonHumanDesc: Allows possessing animals, mechanoids, and other non-colonist pawns.
LanguageData.PS_RequirePawnInFaction: Require target to be in faction
LanguageData.PS_RequirePawnInFactionDesc: Ensures you can only take control of pawns that are part of your faction. Disable carefully, this is unsupported and only meant for fooling around.
LanguageData.PS_MustSelectCharacter: You must select a character before continuing.
LanguageData.PS_StorageNotPermitted: You are trying to place {0} into {1}, but it is not permitted to be stored there in it's storage settings. Would you like to enable storing this item?\n\nNote: This will let other colonists store this item here too.
LanguageData.PS_CannotCarryMoreWeight: You cannot carry any more weight. Consider dropping some items.
LanguageData.PS_BlueprintFull: This blueprint has all materials necessary to build.
LanguageData.PS_StorageDoesNotAccept: Storage does not accept this item.
LanguageData.PS_RomanceAdvanceTitle: {0} is making a romantic advance on you.
LanguageData.PS_MarriageProposalTitle: {0} is asking for your hand in marriage.
LanguageData.PS_GoWithYourGut_Desc: Leave it up to the numbers, what this character would do if not under your control.
LanguageData.PS_PermadeathDesc: With this toggle enabled, for the duration of this run you will not be able to swap to any other pawns or back to director mode to continue your run after you die. You are your only hope.\n\nRecommended only for players willing to lose everything, there is no going back after using this toggle.
LanguageData.PS_AllowSwitchingToDirectorModeDesc: With this toggle enabled, for the duration of this run you may switch to director mode whenever you'd like. However, you are still forced to embody only one colonist and to protect their life.\n\nRecommended for players who want to embody a specific character, but would like to optionally keep the original gameplay fully intact.
LanguageData.PS_InhabitNewCharacter_Desc: Play as somebody else in your game. This will send you back into director mode, where you can click a new character and choose to permanently embody them.
LanguageData.PS_ContinueDynamicMode_Desc: Continue your game in total freedom, where you can swap between any of your characters or director mode at will.
LanguageData.PS_ContinueSwapMode_Desc: Continue your game from the perspective of your characters, freely swapping between them.
LanguageData.PS_ContinueDirectorMode_Desc: Continue your game from an omniscient point of view, directing and managing your characters.
LanguageData.PS_StorageFull: {0} cannot be deposited as the storage is full.
LanguageData.PS_BedForPrisonersOnly: This bed is for prisoners only.
LanguageData.PS_BedForSlavesOnly: This bed is for slaves only.
LanguageData.PS_BedForColonistsOnly: This bed is for colonists only.
